translation.describeOwnVibe: 或者描述一下你自己的风格。
translation.typeThoughts: 请在此处输入您的想法……
translation.thankYou: 感谢您驻足关注。即使是这样小小的问候也意义非凡。

prompts.happened: 这种感觉出现之前发生了什么？
prompts.speak: 如果这种情感会说话，它会说什么？
prompts.notice: 你感觉这种感觉时，身体的哪个部位在感受？
prompts.sitOrShift: 这是你想静静地感受一下，还是轻轻地调整一下？
prompts.kindness: 今天你可以对自己做哪些小小的善事？
prompts.supported: 此刻，什么能让你感到被支持？

translation.startFirstCheckIn: 从这里开始您的首次入住，即可查看您的旅程安排。

howAreYouFeeling: How are you feeling in this moment?
thankYou: Thank you for pausing and noticing. Even this small check-in matters.
startFirstCheckIn: Start your first check-in to see your journey unfold here.

prompts.needing: What might you be needing right now?
prompts.happened: What happened before this feeling showed up?
prompts.speak: If this emotion could speak, what would it say?
prompts.notice: Where do you notice this feeling in your body?
prompts.sitOrShift: Is this something you want to sit with or shift gently?
prompts.ease: What would bring you even 10% more ease?
prompts.kindness: What small kindness could you offer yourself today?
prompts.supported: What would help you feel supported in this moment?

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
